description: Crustdata provides B2B company and people data, including search, enrichment, job, web-search, and batch data retrieval capabilities. Its product is aimed at powering sales, recruiting, research, and AI-agent workflows with programmatic access to indexed and live data.
summary: Crustdata exposes a single versioned REST API at `https://api.crustdata.com` for company, person, job, web, social-post, and batch operations, authenticated with a Crustdata API key as a Bearer token.
